# Sapwood -- Brand Identity

**Date:** 2026-04-04
**Generated by:** brand-forge v1

---

## Name: Sapwood

**Etymology:** Sapwood (also called alburnum) is the living, outermost wood of a tree trunk. It transports water and nutrients between the roots and the crown. In tree anatomy, it sits between the bark (outer protective layer) and the heartwood (dense, dead inner core).

**Why it works:** The Heartwood ecosystem already uses tree anatomy as its naming convention -- Heartwood (the signing device), Bark (the browser extension). Sapwood is the active management layer between them. Anatomically correct, metaphorically precise.

**Collision scan:** Clean namespace. Only Sapwood Media (small Bahrain digital agency) and a dead Nokia GTK+ engine. No dominant software brand.

**Rubric score:** 71/80 (Exceptional)

---

## Tagline: Shape your signer

Action-oriented, alliterative, says what it does in three words. Works as:
- Repository description
- App subtitle
- Page title suffix: "Sapwood -- Shape your signer"

**Runner-up:** "The living layer" (more poetic, works as a secondary descriptor)

---

## Tone

**Personality:** Sovereign, precise, calm

| Do | Don't |
|----|-------|
| State facts clearly ("3 approved clients") | Celebrate unnecessarily ("Awesome! Client added!") |
| Use technical terms your audience knows | Dumb things down or over-explain |
| Confirm actions directly ("Client revoked.") | Add filler ("Your request has been processed successfully") |

**Example phrases:**

| Context | Copy |
|---------|------|
| Welcome | "Connected to Heartwood on /dev/cu.usbmodem1101" |
| Success | "Firmware updated. Rebooting." |
| Error | "Serial connection lost. Check the cable." |
| Status | "2 masters provisioned. 5 approved clients." |
| Destructive | "This will erase all keys. Hold the button to confirm." |

## Domain

**Primary:** sapwood.dev ($10.81/yr, Google-operated gTLD)

| Domain | Status | Price | Purpose |
|--------|--------|-------|---------|
| sapwood.dev | Available | $10.81/yr | Primary |
| sapwood.app | Available | $10.81/yr | Alternate (if app-focused) |
| sapwood.io | Available | $28.12/yr | Alternate (premium) |
| sapwood.org | Available | $6.88/yr | Defensive |
| sapwood.tools | Available | $9.78/yr | Defensive |
| sapwood.com | Taken | -- | Not available |

**Recommendation:** Buy sapwood.dev (primary) + sapwood.app (redirect) + sapwood.org (defensive). Total: ~$28/yr.

## Ecosystem naming

| Component | Name | Metaphor |
|-----------|------|----------|
| Signing device (ESP32) | Heartwood | Dense inner core |
| Management UI (Pi web) | **Sapwood** | Living active layer |
| Browser extension | Bark | Outer protective layer |
| Key derivation | nsec-tree | The tree structure |
